explanations.pt-br: SentenceSplitter com chunk_size=512 e chunk_overlap=50 para dividir documentos em chunks.
explanations.en-us: SentenceSplitter with chunk_size=512 and chunk_overlap=50 to split documents into chunks.

explanations.en-us: get_nodes_from_documents() returns nodes — each chunk inherits metadata from original document.
